feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, and Claude Skills Hub

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: bmad-automator
entry.content: BMAD story automation skills for create/dev/QA/review/retro orchestration.

entry.title: skypilot
entry.content: SkyPilot agent skill for launching cloud VMs, Kubernetes pods, and Slurm jobs across 25+ clouds

entry.title: deventually-cc-resources
entry.content: Curated Claude Code skills and commands for prompt engineering, MCP servers, subagents, hooks, and productivity workflows

entry.title: claude-education-skills
entry.content: 106 evidence-based pedagogical skills for educators. Curriculum design, assessment, learning science, wellbeing, professional learning, and more.

entry.title: claude-hud
entry.content: Real-time statusline HUD for Claude Code - context health, tool activity, agent tracking, and todo progress

entry.title: godot-prompter
entry.content: Agentic skills framework for Godot 4.x game development — 44 domain-specific skills for GDScript and C#

entry.title: groundtruth
entry.content: Audits whether an agent actually did what it was asked. Catches the false 'Done' on Stop: missed subtasks, stubbed/no-op work, false 'tests pass', a method silently dropped in a refactor (dangling reference), and — uniquely — a standing project rule that was in context and overridden anyway. Runs on Stop, pre-commit, and CI; warn by default, opt-in block.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: keel
entry.content: Discipline for AI coding agents: spec before code, verify before done, clean handoffs, safe context recovery.

entry.title: imprint
entry.content: Your habits, imprinted on AI. One plugin replaces eleven skills: memory, compression, onboarding, code review, debugging, planning, progress tracking, testing, git workflow, SEO, and copywriting. Learns how you work and applies it across every session, project, and platform.

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: ouroboros
entry.content: Self-improving AI workflow system. Crystallize requirements before execution with Socratic interview, ambiguity scoring, and 3-stage evaluation.

entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 18 skills (17 user-invokable: /polish, /distill, /audit, /bolder, /quieter, etc.) and an enhanced frontend-design skill with curated anti-patterns.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.content: Turn complex codebases into clear, navigable architecture diagrams

entry.content: Complete developer toolkit for Claude Code

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 273 skills, 92 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 60 agents, 232 skills, 75 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: gsap-skills
entry.content: Official GSAP skills for Claude, Cursor, and other AI agents — animations, timelines, ScrollTrigger, plugins, utilities, React, and performance

entry.title: windows-mcp
entry.content: Windows desktop automation + system tools (Windows-mcp server).

entry.title: mtg-commander
entry.content: MTG Commander deck builder with multi-agent pipeline and adversarial challenger agents. Each primary step (Deck Builder, Rules Judge, Optimizer, Price Evaluator) is verified by a dedicated challenger in an independent correction loop. Synergy-first card selection via Scryfall API, format legality validation, structural optimization, budget enforcement with price goal escalation, and configurable loop caps via `.mtg-commander.yml`. Produces complete 100-card decklists.

entry.title: agent-sop
entry.content: Natural language workflows (SOPs) for AI agents including code-assist, pdd, codebase-summary, code-task-generator, eval, and agent-sop-author.

entry.title: multi-agent-researcher
entry.content: Orchestrated multi-agent research with parallel execution and comprehensive synthesis

entry.title: humanizer
entry.content: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from text. Based on Wikipedia's comprehensive 'Signs of AI writing' guide.

entry.title: communitytools
entry.content: Claude Code skills and agents for authorized security testing, bug bounty hunting, and pentesting workflows

entry.title: logfire-session-capture
entry.content: Captures Claude Code sessions and exports pydantic-ai compatible OTel traces to Pydantic Logfire, with local JSONL fallback.

entry.title: claude-room
entry.content: Real-time E2E encrypted messaging between Claude Code instances — create rooms, discover peers, and collaborate across machines

entry.title: pua
entry.content: Forces high-agency exhaustive problem-solving with corporate PUA pressure. Triggers on explicit PUA requests, user frustration, repeated failures, passive behavior, unverified completion, or quality complaints. v3.4.6 removes permissionDecision=ask prompts from integrity guard; true solution contamination still denies. Not for normal first-attempt requests.

entry.title: debugger-mcp
entry.content: Debug any program from Claude Code via DAP — breakpoints, stepping, variable inspection across Python, Rust, Go, Node.js, and more

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: fluent
entry.content: Fluent — AI Language Learning Kit. Personal AI tutor for any target language. Uses spaced repetition (SM-2), active recall, adaptive difficulty, and tracking across 6 databases. Daily practice: /fluent-review, /fluent-vocab, /fluent-writing, /fluent-speaking, /fluent-reading, /fluent-learn. Start with /fluent-setup.

entry.title: skill-trader
entry.content: MT5 Expert Advisor build & backtest pipeline for macOS. Compile MQ5, backtest with real tick data, collect trade-by-trade results.

entry.title: nano-banana-2
entry.content: Image generation with Google Gemini Nano Banana 2 via MCP

entry.title: xclaude-plugin
entry.content: Modular iOS development automation suite. 8 workflow-specific MCP servers (300-3500 tokens) with 22 tools across Xcode, Simulator, and IDB. Enable only what you need!

entry.title: antigravity-skills
entry.content: Professional Agent Skills collection for full-stack development, logic planning, and multimedia processing.

entry.title: qiongli-political-economy
entry.content: Political economy workflow for institutions, mechanisms, distribution, and comparative political-economic analysis.

entry.title: selic-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Agent Skills: scaffold Home Assistant add-ons, review MCP servers, and more.

entry.title: bopen-tools
entry.content: Development agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code workflows

entry.title: splock
entry.content: A governed plan -> implement -> verify lifecycle framework for Claude Code: deterministic enforcement spine (sealed-state hooks, intent/collision registry, Ralph completion gate) over a two-call planner, slash-command workflow, and subagent roster. Anthropic-native.

entry.title: ai-iq
entry.content: Memory → Evaluation → Credential → Access Control for AI agents. Persistent memory with W3C Verifiable Credentials, capability-based access control, drift detection, and FSRS-6 spaced repetition.

entry.title: axonflow
entry.content: Policy enforcement, PII detection, and audit trails for Claude Code. Govern tool execution, scan outputs for sensitive data, and maintain compliance-grade records of every action.

entry.title: claude-vc
entry.content: Venture capital analysis toolkit for Claude Code. Six commands covering deal screening, investment memos with due diligence checklists, term sheet analysis, cap table modeling, financial modeling, and portfolio analytics (reports, KPIs, returns).

entry.title: bkper-cli
entry.content: Adds Bkper CLI guidance for safe Bkper data, reporting, app development, and accounting-support workflows in Claude Code.

entry.title: affiliate-networks-mcp
entry.content: Chat with your affiliate-network data in Claude through a local MCP server. 80+ publisher and advertiser-side adapters across the US, EU, Nordics, APAC and LatAm, most experimental.

entry.title: leerie
entry.content: Deterministic, headless task orchestrator for Claude Code. Classifies a task, decomposes it into granular subtasks, schedules them into dependency-ordered waves, and executes each in an isolated git worktree under an evidence-gated implement/validate loop. Runs entirely on the Claude Code CLI/subscription via `claude -p` workers.

entry.title: hyperclaude
entry.content: Push Claude Code beyond stock. Skills, agents, Codex collab — opinionated and personal.

entry.title: workflow-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for general engineering workflows: collaborative PR review, durable multi-step planning, auditable quantitative analysis pipelines with independent fact-checking, and a repo-native task loop for capturing and processing follow-up work.

entry.title: azure-cosmosdb
entry.content: Official Claude plugin for Azure Cosmos DB (NoSQL). Bundles skills for data modeling, partition key design, query optimization, SDK best practices, indexing, vector search, full-text search, global distribution, security, and more.

entry.title: personal-assistant
entry.content: Kisisel asistan plugin'i — init kontrolleri, oturum yonetimi, extension builder, commit, project-init, worktree, obsidian docs, user-message, diji-logs, log-triage, design-brief, global rules

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: cancer-buddy
entry.content: 抗癌搭子 — CancerDAO's patient-facing AI cancer companion. A meta-skill plus companion sub-skills (record organize, nutrition, mind, find-care, caregiver, education, disclosure, second-opinion, vault) that walk a patient and their family through the cancer journey. Never fabricates medical facts; hotlines, doctors, hospitals, trials, and citations must trace to a live source.

entry.title: apple-numbers
entry.content: Read and write Apple Numbers spreadsheets - read tables, create files, update cells, manage sheets/tables, search, import CSV/TSV/JSON, and export data (macOS only)

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Adam's portable skills: code-review, prepare-for-merging, merge-and-open-next-in-stack, autonomous-loop, supervised-team, docs, update-pr-description, writing-pr-descriptions, documenting-code, and llm-wiki. Works in Claude Code (as a plugin) and Codex (via prompts/AGENTS.md).

entry.title: dataforce
entry.content: Dataforce MCP — query your Shopify orders, stock, and Google Ads from any MCP client. Installs the remote MCP server config and runs OAuth login on first use.

entry.title: quirk
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, typed artifacts, deep-research/brainstorming exploration with a user-involvement dial, and proven techniques

entry.title: mssql-performance-skills
entry.content: 26 SQL Server performance tuning skills for Claude Code — static T-SQL analysis, execution plans, wait stats, deadlock, query store, AG health, AG configuration, ERRORLOG, SPN, memory, disk I/O, encryption, configuration drift, setup bootstrap log, SSRS trace log review, and migration readiness

entry.title: wet-mcp
entry.content: Web search, content extraction, and media download

entry.title: daily.dev
entry.content: Access personalized developer content feeds from daily.dev - the professional network for developers. Surface relevant articles, tutorials, and discussions based on user interests.

entry.title: yas
entry.content: Claude Code statusline showing info at a glance: tokens, context, model, subagents, burn rate, skills, plugins, OpenSpec specs, task lists, and more

entry.title: woz
entry.content: WOZCODE enhanced coding tools — smart search, batch editing, SQL introspection, and cost-optimized subagent delegation

entry.title: bunqueue
entry.content: AI-native job queue for Bun — skills, MCP server (73 tools), custom agent, SQLite persistence, cron, priorities, retries, DLQ, webhooks

entry.title: project-orchestration-skills
entry.content: Skills for AI-assisted project orchestration following best practices for software development lifecycle, architecture documentation, and quality automation

entry.content: Site generation skills for the OpenDataHub Skills Registry
